communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the New York Freedom of Information Law, I hereby request the following records:

All parking violation records issued on the block face of East 71st St Between Fifth Avenue and Madison Avenue, from January 1 2002 through December 31st 2019, including for each violation: the date time, license plate number, state of registration and violation type.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 5 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

pherring

communications.subject: New York Freedom of Information Law Request: Chester Warehouse Records
communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the New York Freedom of Information Law, I hereby request the following records:

All emails, text messages, and written communications sent or received by the Orange County Executive's office and the Orange County Attorney's office that contain any of the following terms: "Chester warehouse," "29 Elizabeth Drive," "ICE detention," or "Pep Boys."

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 5 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

EJ Fox

communications.subject: COUNTY FOIL REQUEST :: R003907-030826
communications.communication:
Dear EJ Fox: 
Thank you for your interest in public records of Orange County. Your request has been received and is being processed in accordance with the State of New York's Freedom of Information Law (FOIL). Your request was received in this office on 3/8/2026 and given the reference number R003907-030826 for tracking purposes. Records Requested: To Whom It May Concern: 

Pursuant to the New York Freedom of Information Law, I hereby request the following records: 

All emails, text messages, and written communications sent or received by the Orange County Executive's office and the Orange County Attorney's office that contain any of the following terms: "Chester warehouse," "29 Elizabeth Drive," "ICE detention," or "Pep Boys." 

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes. 

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not. 

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 5 business days, as the statute requires. 

Sincerely, 

EJ Fox 

Upload documents directly: https://www.muckrock.com/respond/2235700/ 
Your request will be forwarded to the relevant department(s) to conduct a search the records you seek and to determine the volume and any costs associated with satisfying your request. You will be contacted with a formal acknowledgement of your request in accordance with FOIL Law within five (5) business days. 
PLEASE NOTE: The State of New York Freedom of Information Law (FOIL) does not require a governmental body to create new information, to do legal research, or to answer questions. 
You can monitor the progress of your request at the link below and you WILL receive an email when your request has been completed. Again, thank you for using the FOIL Records Center. 
Orange County
